/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l0_com.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l0_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l0_mem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l0_stat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l1_op_geno.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l1_stat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l2_besd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l2_bfile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l2_efile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l2_enet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l2_reml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l3_efile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l3_ewas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l3_glmnet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l3_gwas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l3_permutation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l3_smr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l3_vqtl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/l4_osc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/cis_learn_beta.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/dcdflib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osca.dir/src/Module_vqtl_drm_svlm.c.o -o osca  /opt/homebrew/lib/libRmath.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libz.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgsl.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgslcblas.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libomp.a lib/liboscalib.a -lRmath -lpthread -lm
